title: CCP-9: current_channel field added but validation, serialization missing
description: Codereview finding P1: __post_init__, to_bytes, from_bytes, signed_data, with_incremented_hop_count not updated for new field. Must fix before closing bead. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Fixed by adding rx_channel to AnnounceMessage dataclass, updated __post_init__ validation, signed_data (now includes rx_channel for auth), to_bytes/from_bytes with shifted offsets and updated _FIXED_LENGTH=94, with_incremented_hop_count copy. Roundtrip tests pass. Matches CCP-9 spec in 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:74.
